final:
// // This module implements a 4-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
module top_module(
  input [7:0] D0,
  input [7:0] D1,
  input [7:0] D2,
  input [7:0] D3,
  input [1:0] SEL,
  output [7:0] Y
);assign Y = (SEL == 2'b00) ? D0 :
             (SEL == 2'b01) ? D1 :
             (SEL == 2'b10) ? D2 :
             (SEL == 2'b11) ? D3 :
             8'h00;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
